docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LESACA, RAYMUNDO COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
#1-JUDGE WICK; P.LEE, CLERK THOMAS WRIGHT, ATTY, APPEAR FOR PLT KEVIN MALONE, IN PRO PER, APPEAR 11:00AM C/C FOR CT TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED NOT ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR PLT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALONE, KEVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1450 CLAY ST, #8 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,791.54 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,791.54, STAYED UNTIL SEP-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
